news.t: Disruptive Theme of the Week: Bitcoin Miner Optionality
Grayscale Launches Grayscale® Bitcoin Miners ETF (Ticker: MNRS)

holdings.infoBox: MNRS is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hut 8 stock at 13.73%, Applied Digital at 13.46%, IREN Limited at 13.08%, Keel Infrastructure at 6.29%, and Bitdeer Technologies Group at 5.45%.

overview.description: The Grayscale Bitcoin Miners ETF (MNRS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Bitcoin Miners index. The fund tracks an index of global companies that generate revenue from bitcoin mining activities or mining related services. Constituents are selected and weighted based on market-cap and revenue tied to the relevant theme. MNRS was launched on Jan 30, 2025 and is issued by Grayscale.
